title: senecio sectilis
intro: Senecio sectilis, also known as Cotton Bush or Ragwort, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Senecio sectilis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Senecio sectilis often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
